name: scientific-research
description: Disciplined scholarly research workflow: discovery, source routing, DOI dedup, claim ledgers, and evidence quality gates across arXiv/OpenAlex/Crossref/Europe PMC/Semantic Scholar/NCBI/CORE/OpenCitations.

interface.longDescription: Scientific Research gives the host agent a disciplined workflow for scholarly discovery, source routing, deduplication, open-copy handling, claim ledgers, and evidence quality gates across arXiv, OpenAlex, Crossref, Europe PMC, Semantic Scholar, NCBI, CORE, and OpenCitations.
defaultPrompt: Research recent papers on this topic.
